untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) consolidation/base period (10-15 days) - requires lookback window analysis not expressible in single-bar conditions; (2) catalyst event identification - no market event/news indicator available; (3) catalyst recency tracking (5 trading days) - requires external event timestamp data. Volume confirmation and breakout detection are translatable, but the core catalyst-driven logic and consolidation detection require external data or multi-bar pattern recognition beyond allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the breakout-on-volume concept (volume > 120% average using vol_ratio_20) with price crossing Bollinger Bands as a proxy for consolidation breakout. However, the signal's fundamental premise—waiting for a market catalyst event—cannot be operationalized without access to news/event data. The 10-15 day consolidation period and 5-day catalyst recency window require lookback analysis and external event feeds not available in the indicator set. Recommend: (1) Add event flag indicator; (2) Add consolidation detector (range / volatility compression metric); (3) Allow multi-bar pattern conditions.
